issues.title: Misspelling in Documentation
issues.body:
Misspelling of PromptTemplate in documentation at [structured output converter](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/structured-output-converter.html#_structured_output_api)

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/951c99e6-8295-4a6c-a85a-650bac226e1d)

comments.body:
@xdHampus Thank you for your efforts fixing the spelling inside the image. Since we had the same issue addressed in an earlier https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3304, we merged that. Apologies for not merging this PR. 

Closing this now.
